title: Nested JSON Extraction with Recursive Dependencies
scenario: Write a prompt that extracts a list of employee names from a nested JSON structure, where each employee has a manager with a manager, and so on, up to a maximum depth of 3. The JSON object has the following structure: {'name': 'John', 'manager': {'name': 'Jane', 'manager': {'name': 'Bob', 'manager': {'name': 'Alice'}}}}, 'team_members': [{'name': 'Alice', 'manager': {'name': 'Bob'}}, {'name': 'Charlie', 'manager': {'name': 'Bob'}}]}. The prompt should generate a list of employee names in the correct order of hierarchy, from top to bottom.
constraints: Must extract employee names in the correct order of hierarchy

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated prompt uses recursion and handles nested JSON objects.
Verify that the generated list of employee names is in the correct order of hierarchy.
Check if the generated prompt is syntactically valid and can be executed without errors.
